[From the commentary it is clear that Sage Kasyapa had
treated of the subject of commodities and price fluctuations. For
this purpose the ancients had allotted different substances to the
different Signs of the Zodiac. If the concerned Sign is unafflictcd,
but well-aspected, the articles will be available in plenty and also
fetch good prices.]
Sign Aries is considered to rule over cloths, sheep's wool,
clothes made of goat's hair, lentils, wheat, resin, barley, herbs grow-
ing on land, and gold.
[Cf.

Sign Taurus controls cloths, flowers, wheat, rice, barley,
buffaloes and bullocks. Gemini presides over corn, autumnal cree-
pers like grape vines, lily bulbs and cotton.
[Cf. +IV4M —

Sign Cancer rules over paspalum, bananas, Diirva grass, fruits,
bulbs, fragrant leaves and woody cassia (or cocoanut ?). Sign Leo
controls husk-grains, juices, skins of lions etc. and jaggery.
[Cf. —
